fields.name: positive_prompt
fields.label: Positive Prompt
fields.instructions: Text description of the video to generate (supports markdown from WordPress post content)

fields.name: negative_prompt
fields.label: Negative Prompt
fields.instructions: What to avoid in the generated video

fields.name: resolution_x
fields.label: Width (Resolution X)
fields.instructions: Output video width in pixels (LTX-2.3 supports 768x512, 1280x704, etc.)

fields.name: num_frames
fields.label: Number of Frames
fields.instructions: Video length in frames (LTX-2.3 supports up to 133 frames)

fields.name: fps
fields.label: FPS
fields.instructions: Frames per second for output video (LTX-2.3 native is 25 fps)

fields.name: steps
fields.label: Sampling Steps
fields.instructions: Number of denoising steps (32 recommended for LTX-2.3)

fields.name: seed
fields.label: Seed
fields.instructions: Random seed for reproducible generation (use -1 for random)

fields.name: output_filename_prefix
fields.label: Output Filename Prefix
fields.instructions: Prefix for the output video filename (e.g., ltx23_post_{post_id})

fields.name: lora_enabled
fields.label: Enable LoRA
fields.instructions: Toggle to apply a LoRA to the LTX-2.3 model

fields.name: lora_name
fields.label: LoRA Name
fields.instructions: Select an available LoRA or enter a custom LoRA name (e.g., motion_blur_ltx23.safetensors)

fields.name: lora_path
fields.label: LoRA Path (Custom)
fields.instructions: Full path to a custom LoRA file if using a non-standard LoRA

fields.name: lora_weight
fields.label: LoRA Weight
fields.instructions: Strength of the LoRA application (1.0 = full strength, 0.0 = disabled)
